Mississippi Final Paycheck Law 2026
When your last check is due in Mississippi, what it has to contain, and what to do if it's late.
If you were terminated
Next regular payday
If you resigned
Next regular payday
How to audit a Mississippi final paycheck
For Mississippi, do not read the final-pay rule as a generic "next payroll" promise. The same deadline applies whether the worker was terminated or resigned: next regular payday. Workers should preserve the termination or resignation notice, the ...
